Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xC0B3 "WIZARDSLAIR-7000-C0B3" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $7000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Wizard's Lair.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $7000 which copies 256 bytes of data from $7010 down to $0000 so that the dump can start at $0400. This allows the game to run correctly.
The loading screen is from the Spectrum version
